user.title: Knob Swipe Navigation
user.description: Choose one ZHA rotary knob device and the dashboard it should control. Add the integration again for each additional knob.

data.Wrap from last tab to first: Wrap from last tab to first

data_description.ZHA knob device: Choose the ZHA rotary knob that emits rotate_type events.
data_description.Dashboard path: Use the first dashboard URL segment, for example lovelace or dashboard-home. Full dashboard URLs are also accepted.
data_description.Enable knob navigation: Use rotations from the selected knob to move between dashboard tabs.
data_description.Show tab overlay: Show a temporary tab picker before changing tabs.
data_description.Overlay display time: How long the tab overlay stays visible, in milliseconds.
data_description.Rotation cooldown: Minimum time between accepted rotations, in milliseconds. The default is 2000 ms (2 seconds).
data_description.Wrap from last tab to first: After the last tab, continue at the first tab, and before the first tab, continue at the last tab.
data_description.Required URL query parameter: Optional. Set a query parameter such as kiosk so only matching browser URLs react.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Knob Swipe Navigation
reconfigure.description: Choose the ZHA rotary knob device and the dashboard it should control.

error.not_zha_device: Select a device provided by ZHA.

init.title: Knob Swipe Navigation options
init.description: Configure the dashboard and runtime behavior for knob navigation.

device_not_zha.message: The configured knob device is no longer provided by ZHA. Reconfigure Knob Swipe Navigation and select a ZHA device.

device_not_zha.title: Selected knob device is unavailable
device_not_zha.description: The configured knob device is not currently provided by ZHA. Open the Knob Swipe Navigation integration, start reconfiguration, and select a ZHA rotary knob device.
